diagrams.title: Steepest Descent Iteration Path
diagrams.description: Shows zigzag convergence pattern on elongated ellipses
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how successive search directions are orthogonal causing zigzag pattern

diagrams.title: Step Size Selection
diagrams.purpose: Understand how optimal α is chosen to minimize f(x_k + αd_k)

diagrams.title: Convergence vs Condition Number
diagrams.description: Shows how condition number affects convergence speed
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why high condition number causes slow convergence
